pi_items.source: Task defines custom taxonomy vocabulary name; verified as user-defined machine name (no authoritative external source)
These are legitimate real brand names used in commerce
Official Sony specification: WH-1000XM5 weighs 250g = 0.25kg. Verified from https://helpguide.sony.net/mdr/wh1000xm5/v1/en/contents/TP1000541014.html

seed_products.php does not contain any product with 'AirPods Pro' in title. Line 46 seeds 'Apple MacBook Air M2 13-inch', not AirPods Pro. export_result.sh line 64 references product that doesn't exist in database.
Apple official specs: Each AirPod Pro (2nd Gen) earbud is 5.3g. Charging case is 50.8g (~0.0508kg). Total ~0.061kg, not 0.051kg. Sources: https://support.apple.com/kb/SP880
seed_products.php does not contain 'Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro'. Line 47 seeds 'Samsung 65-inch 4K QLED Smart TV' instead. export_result.sh line 65 references product that doesn't exist in database.
Samsung official specs: Each Galaxy Buds2 Pro earbud weighs 5.5g. Product doesn't exist in database. Sources: https://www.sammobile.com/samsung/galaxy-buds-2-pro/specs/

Official Logitech specification: MX Master 3S weighs 141g = 0.141kg. Verified from https://hub.sync.logitech.com/mx-master-3s/post/specifications---mx-master-3s-for-business-YAOnlMzTGrkzjuy and https://www.rtings.com/mouse/reviews/logitech/mx-master-3s

seed_products.php line 48 seeds 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds' with SKU BOSE-QCUE, NOT 'Bose QuietComfort 45'. export_result.sh line 67 references QuietComfort 45 which doesn't exist in base seeded products.

Official Bose specification: QuietComfort 45 weighs 429g = 0.429kg. Some sources list 240g as earbud-only weight, but official spec is 429g. Sources: https://www.rtings.com/headphones/reviews/bose/quietcomfort-45-qc45-wireless and https://www.bose.com

privileged_info_summary: Critical mismatch found: Task.json specifies 5 products to enrich with brand/weight data, but 3 of the 5 products do NOT exist in the seeded database. Seeded products: 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' (0.250kg correct), 'Apple MacBook Air M2' (not AirPods Pro), 'Samsung 65-inch TV' (not Galaxy Buds2 Pro), 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds' (not QuietComfort 45), 'Logitech MX Master 3S' (0.141kg correct). The task references non-existent products: Apple AirPods Pro (0.051kg - actual is ~0.0053kg per earbud), Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro (0.057kg - actual is ~0.0055kg per earbud), Bose QuietComfort 45 (0.240kg - actual is 0.429kg). Data is based on real product specifications but task specification is internally inconsistent with the database schema.
